scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "cd backend && PORT=3209 npm run dev" "cd frontend && VITE_PORT=5209 VITE_API_PORT=3209 npm run dev"
scripts.seed: cd backend && npm run build && npm run seed
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && PORT=3209 npm run dev
scripts.dev:frontend: cd frontend && VITE_PORT=5209 VITE_API_PORT=3209 npm run dev
scripts.start: cd backend && PORT=3209 npm run start
